title: 100 pcs Masonry Nails, 30mm(1.2 inch) Brick Steel Carbon Steel Point Tip Wall Cement Woodworking Concrete Nails, Galvanised Concrete Black Wall Nails for Wood Masonry Picture Hanging
features: Sturdy Steel:Our nails are made of galvanised carbon steel with excellent resistance to bending and high stability, even under intense use. The optimised design of the striking surface ensures precise hammering every time, making work more efficient
Pack ing List:Each pack conta ins 100 pcs 30 mm, Size:Head Diameter(Approx.): 6 mm/0.23 in; Total Length: 30 mm/1.2 in; Shaft Diameter: 2.8 mm/0.11 in

Suitable for Different Surfaces:With its strong stability steel nails can be used consistently on many different surfaces, including concrete, masonry, plasterboard and wood, whether it's walls or other hard surfaces
Galvanised: The surface is galvanised to protect the nails from corrosion
Areas of Application: Whether it's nails for picture mounting or nails for fastening, our range of steel nails offers the best solution for every application
description: Product Description Cement steel nails are made of high quality steel material, which is not easy to bend, corrosion resistant and durable. The sharp nail tip easily penetrates a variety of materials including concrete walls, brick walls, plaster walls and wood. The steel nails are available in different sizes to suit home improvement projects, timber repairs and DIY jobs. Whether you're hanging picture frames or fixing furniture, these steel nails are an economical and practical tool. Available in a choice of sizes, this product is ideal for DIY projects, timber repairs, picture hanging and DIY work.
